# MuleSoft Documentation

> Mirrored from https://docs.mulesoft.com/llms.txt - Updated 2026-06-15 14:39 UTC
> LLM-friendly index of all MuleSoft product documentation.

## Guides

- [a2a-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/a2a-connector/llms.txt): Facilitates inter-agent communication for LLM agents and other applications by implementing the A2A protocol.
- [accelerators-cim](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/accelerators-cim/llms.txt): The Cloud Information Model (CIM) for MuleSoft Accelerators is an application-agnostic data model that simplifies integration and accelerates innovation.
- [accelerators-home](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/accelerators-home/llms.txt): Accelerators are a collection of technical assets (predominantly API specifications and implementation templates), reference architectures, and documentation that can be used to accelerate the implementation of multiple use cases supporting a larger business or industry problem.
- [access-management](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/access-management/llms.txt): Manages users, teams, roles, permissions, environments, business groups, identity providers, and Salesforce org connections.
- [agentforce-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/agentforce-connector/llms.txt): Enables you to design, build, and manage AI agents within Anypoint Platform.
- [agent-visualizer](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/agent-visualizer/llms.txt): Provides visual monitoring and insights for agent networks, showing real-timegraphs of agents, MCP servers, and LLMs with search and filtering
- [aggregators-module](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/aggregators-module/llms.txt): Contains different types of aggregators capable of storing values and releasing them all together based on the configuration specified.
- [amazon-bedrock-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/amazon-bedrock-connector/llms.txt): Provides the ability to connect to all supported LLMs through an unification layer
- [amazon-dynamodb-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/amazon-dynamodb-connector/llms.txt): Provides connectivity to the Amazon DynamoDB API.
- [amazon-ec2-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/amazon-ec2-connector/llms.txt): Provides connectivity to the Amazon Elastic Compute Cloud (Amazon EC2) API, enabling you to interface with Amazon EC2 to launch as many or as few virtual servers as you need, configure security and networking, and manage storage.
- [amazon-kinesis-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/amazon-kinesis-connector/llms.txt): Provides access to standard Amazon Kinesis Data Stream operations using Anypoint Platform.
- [amazon-lambda-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/amazon-lambda-connector/llms.txt): Provides access to standard Amazon Lambda operations using Anypoint Platform.
- [amazon-rds-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/amazon-rds-connector/llms.txt): Provides connectivity to the Amazon Relational Database Service (Amazon RDS) API.
- [amazon-redshift-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/amazon-redshift-connector/llms.txt): Enables synchronization of data and automates business processes between Amazon Redshift and third-party applications, either on-premises or in the cloud.
- [amazon-s3-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/amazon-s3-connector/llms.txt): Provides connectivity to the Amazon S3 API, enabling you to interface with Amazon S3 to store objects, download and use data with other AWS services, and build applications that require internet storage.
- [amazon-secrets-manager-properties-provider-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/amazon-secrets-manager-properties-provider-connector/llms.txt): Enables you to retrieve your secrets from AWS Secrets Manager.
- [amazon-sns-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/amazon-sns-connector/llms.txt): Provides connectivity to the Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) API, enabling you to build distributed web-enabled applications.
- [amazon-sqs-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/amazon-sqs-connector/llms.txt): Provides an easy way to interface with the Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) API, enabling Mule users to manage SQS queueing services without having to interact with the API directly.
- [amqp-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/amqp-connector/llms.txt): Enables your application to publish and consume messages using an AMQP 0.9.1-compliant broker.
- [anypoint-cli](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/anypoint-cli/llms.txt): Anypoint Platform CLI provides scripting and command-line capabilities for Anypoint Platform and Anypoint Platform Private Cloud Edition (PCE).
- [anypoint-code-builder](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/anypoint-code-builder/llms.txt): Use the Anypoint Code Builder integrated development environment (IDE) for your API designs, implementations, and integration development.
- [anypoint-mq-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/anypoint-mq-connector/llms.txt): Provides publish-subscribe messaging to Mule apps using the Anypoint MQ cloud service.
- [anypoint-security](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/anypoint-security/llms.txt): Anypoint Security for Anypoint Runtime Fabric provides a layered approach to secure your application network.
- [api-community-manager](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/api-community-manager/llms.txt): With Anypoint API Community Manager, you can build and operate communities around your APIs for developers and partners, both inside and outside of your organization, who write applications that use your APIs.
- [api-experience-hub](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/api-experience-hub/llms.txt): API Experience Hub provides a unified portal for discovering and consuming APIs and AI agents.
- [api-functional-monitoring](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/api-functional-monitoring/llms.txt): API Functional Monitoring is a component of Anypoint Platform that enables you to ensure the quality and reliability of public and private APIs that are being used in application networks.
- [api-governance](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/api-governance/llms.txt): Anypoint API Governance is a component of Anypoint Platform that enables you to apply governance rules to your APIs as part of the API lifecycle.
- [apikit](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/apikit/llms.txt): APIkit scaffolds Mule applications from AsyncAPI, gRPC, GraphQL, OData, RAML, OpenAPI Specification (OAS), and SOAP contracts, validates inbound traffic against those contracts, and can generate MUnit test suites.
- [api-manager](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/api-manager/llms.txt): Anypoint API Manager (API Manager) is a component of Anypoint Platform that enables you to manage, govern, and secure APIs and server instances.
- [as2-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/as2-connector/llms.txt): Enables trading partners to transmit and receive AS2 messages with EDI-X12, EDIFACT, XML, or binary payloads.
- [asana-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/asana-connector/llms.txt): Enables synchronization of data and automates business processes between Asana and third-party applications, either on-premises or in the cloud.
- [azure-cosmos-db-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/azure-cosmos-db-connector/llms.txt): Enables you to access the Azure Cosmos DB API.
- [azure-data-lake-storage-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/azure-data-lake-storage-connector/llms.txt): Enables integration with Azure Data Lake using its Gen2 REST API.
- [azure-event-hubs-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/azure-event-hubs-connector/llms.txt): Enables you to access the Azure Event Hubs.
- [azure-key-vault-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/azure-key-vault-connector/llms.txt): Enables you to access the Azure Key Vault API.
- [azure-key-vault-properties-provider-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/azure-key-vault-properties-provider-connector/llms.txt): Enables you to access the Azure Key Vault API.
- [azure-service-bus-management-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/azure-service-bus-management-connector/llms.txt): Enables you to connect to the Amazon Azure service bus.
- [blackboard-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/blackboard-connector/llms.txt): Enables you to connect to the Blackboard API.
- [box-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/box-connector/llms.txt): Provides access to the Box Content API for secure content management and content experience features for use in your own app.
- [canvas-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/canvas-connector/llms.txt): Enables you to connect to the Canvas API.
- [caqh-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/caqh-connector/llms.txt): Provides access to a nonprofit that collects, stores, monitors, and validates healthcare providers’ information.
- [cassandra-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/cassandra-connector/llms.txt): Creates connectivity between Appache Cassandra databases and third-party applications, systems, services such as SAP, PeopleSoft, or Workday, as well as other databases across the enterprise.
- [cloudhub](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/cloudhub/llms.txt): CloudHub is an integration platform as a service (iPaaS) where you can deploy sophisticated cross-cloud integration applications in the cloud, create new APIs on top of existing data sources, integrate on-premises applications with cloud services, and much more.
- [cloudhub-2](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/cloudhub-2/llms.txt): CloudHub 2.0 is a fully managed, containerized integration platform as a service (iPaaS) where you can deploy APIs and integrations as lightweight containers in the cloud.
- [cloudhub-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/cloudhub-connector/llms.txt): Enables you to connect to the CloudHub API from your Mule application.
- [coda-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/coda-connector/llms.txt): Enables you to connect to the Coda API.
- [commerce-cloud-b2c-data-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/commerce-cloud-b2c-data-connector/llms.txt): Enables you to access the Salesforce Commerce Cloud Data API and access the data, update the data, and delete the data, as required.
- [commerce-cloud-shop-api-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/commerce-cloud-shop-api-connector/llms.txt): This connector enables a client to interact with the system as a shop customer or as an agent shopping on behalf of a customer.
- [composer](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/composer/llms.txt): MuleSoft Composer (Composer) automates data integration between systems using a no-code, visual interface.
- [composer-salesforce](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/composer-salesforce/llms.txt): MuleSoft Composer for Salesforce (Composer) automates data integration between systems using a no-code interface within your Salesforce org.
- [compression-module](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/compression-module/llms.txt): Supports and provides access to the most-used file archiver and compression formats through a Mule app.
- [confluent-schema-registry-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/confluent-schema-registry-connector/llms.txt): Enables you to access the Confluent Schema Registry platform.
- [connector-builder](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/connector-builder/llms.txt): Use Connector Builder to create your own connectors easily.
- [connectors](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/connectors/llms.txt): Anypoint Connectors are reusable extensions to Mule runtime engine (Mule) that enable you to integrate your apps with third-party APIs, databases, and standard integration protocols without writing complex code.
- [consumer-goods](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/consumer-goods/llms.txt): MuleSoft Accelerator for Consumer Goods helps consumer goods companies integrate their digital operations to gain visibility into trade promotion management and retail execution.
- [cryptography-module](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/cryptography-module/llms.txt): Cryptography module provides cryptography capabilities to a Mule application.
- [custom-metrics-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/custom-metrics-connector/llms.txt): Anypoint Custom Metrics Connector enables you to send operational and business metric values that you define from an application to Anypoint Monitoring, where the metrics can be visualized in real time using custom dashboards.
- [d2l-brightspace-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/d2l-brightspace-connector/llms.txt): Enables you to connect to the D2L Brightspace API.
- [datagraph](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/datagraph/llms.txt): Anypoint DataGraph enables you to unify all the data within your application network in a unified schema.
- [dataweave](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/dataweave/llms.txt): This MuleSoft programming language simplifies data transformation tasks and serves as Mule runtime’s expression language for configuring components and connectors.
- [db-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/db-connector/llms.txt): Can connect to almost any Java Database Connectivity (JDBC) relational database and run SQL operations.
- [design-center](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/design-center/llms.txt): Anypoint Design Center is a development environment that includes API Designer, a tool that enables you to create API specifications in several modeling languages and create RAML API fragments.
- [dhl-tracking-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/dhl-tracking-connector/llms.txt): Enables you to connect to the DHL Tracking API.
- [docusign-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/docusign-connector/llms.txt): Enables you to access the DocuSign platform.
- [dropbox-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/dropbox-connector/llms.txt): Enables you to access the Dropbox API.
- [edifact-edi-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/edifact-edi-connector/llms.txt): Lets you convert EDIFACT messages to and from DataWeave-compatible representations using lists and maps.
- [einstein-ai-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/einstein-ai-connector/llms.txt): Provides connectivity to LLMs via the Salesforce Einstein Trust Layer.
- [email-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/email-connector/llms.txt): Sends and retrieves email messages over standard email protocols.
- [eu-control-plane](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/eu-control-plane/llms.txt): MuleSoft hosts a version of the Anypoint Platform control plane entirely within the EU (Frankfurt or Dublin data centers).
- [exchange](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/exchange/llms.txt): Anypoint Exchange is a curated catalog of reusable assets.
- [file-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/file-connector/llms.txt): Handles files and folders on a locally mounted file system.
- [financial-services](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/financial-services/llms.txt): MuleSoft Accelerator for Financial Services simplifies customer 360 initiatives by unlocking both core banking and insurance platforms, systems of engagement (such as CRM and ITSM), Insuretechs, and FinTech data.
- [ftp-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/ftp-connector/llms.txt): Provides access to files and folders on an FTP server.
- [ftps-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/ftps-connector/llms.txt): Connects to FTP servers the same way as the FTP connector but adds support for Transport Layer Security (TLS).
- [gateway](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/gateway/llms.txt): Omni Gateway (formally Flex Gateway) is an Envoy-based, ultrafast lightweight API gateway designed to manage and secure APIs running anywhere.
- [general](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/general/llms.txt): Get started with a tutorial for building your first API, resource pages with links to other guides and websites, and a glossary.
- [gmail-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/gmail-connector/llms.txt): Enables you to access the Gmail platform.
- [google-bigquery-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/google-bigquery-connector/llms.txt): Enables access to the Google BigQuery service.
- [google-calendar-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/google-calendar-connector/llms.txt): Enables access to the Google Calendar service.
- [google-drive-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/google-drive-connector/llms.txt): Enables access to the Google Drive service.
- [google-gemini-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/google-gemini-connector/llms.txt): Enables you to connect to the Google Gemini API.
- [google-pubsub-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/google-pubsub-connector/llms.txt): Enables access to the Google Pub/Sub service.
- [google-sheets-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/google-sheets-connector/llms.txt): Synchronizes data and automates business processes between Google Sheets and third-party applications, either on-premises or in the cloud.
- [gov-cloud](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/gov-cloud/llms.txt): MuleSoft Government Cloud is a secure, Federal Risk and Authorization Management Program (FedRAMP)-moderate certified deployment environment that enables government agencies to use Anypoint Platform in the cloud.
- [grpc-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/grpc-connector/llms.txt): Enable high-performance integration with gRPC services using protocol buffers for efficient, type-safe communication.
- [hdfs-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/hdfs-connector/llms.txt): Works as a bidirectional gateway between Mule applications and Apache Hadoop Distributed File System (HDFS).
- [healthcare](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/healthcare/llms.txt): The MuleSoft Accelerator for Healthcare equips Payer, Provider, and Life Sciences organizations with foundational assets to accelerate their digital transformation journey.
- [hl7-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/hl7-connector/llms.txt): This connector enables you to convert HL7 ER7 messages to and from DataWeave-compatible representations using lists and maps.
- [hl7-mllp-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/hl7-mllp-connector/llms.txt): Provides connectivity and parsing functionality for HL7 MLLP messages.
- [hosting-home](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/hosting-home/llms.txt): Host the Anypoint Platform control plane and runtime plane in different locations to meet your security, data privacy, and compliance requirements.
- [http-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/http-connector/llms.txt): Enables you to declare HTTP servers that listen to requests and trigger flows, as well as HTTP clients that can communicate with any HTTP service.
- [hybrid-standalone](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/hybrid-standalone/llms.txt): Hybrid standalone instances enable you to host the Mule runtime engine (Mule) in an environment you control.
- [hyperforce](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/hyperforce/llms.txt): Salesforce Hyperforce (Hyperforce) provides a modern infrastructure that lets you deploy MuleSoft applications globally with control over data residency and compliance.
- [ibm-ctg-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/ibm-ctg-connector/llms.txt): Provides integration with back-end CICS apps using the CICS Transaction Gateway.
- [ibm-mq-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/ibm-mq-connector/llms.txt): Enables an app to do messaging to a IBM MQ Broker using the IBM MQ JMS implementation.
- [idp](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/idp/llms.txt): MuleSoft Intelligent Document Processing (IDP) enables you to read invoices, purchase orders, and other unstructured or semi-structured documents and then analyze and refine the extracted content using AI capabilities to create a structured response.
- [informatica-b360-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/informatica-b360-connector/llms.txt): Integrate with the Informatica Business 360 (MDM) REST API for master data management, including entity CRUD, search, fuzzy matching, and metadata discovery.
- [intercom-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/intercom-connector/llms.txt): Synchronizes data and automates business processes between Google Sheets and third-party applications, either on-premises or in the cloud.
- [java-module](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/java-module/llms.txt): Used to invoke Java code.
- [jira-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/jira-connector/llms.txt): Enables synchronization of data and automation of business processes between Jira and third-party applications, either on-premises or in the cloud.
- [jms-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/jms-connector/llms.txt): Enables your app to do messaging using the JMS implementation of your choice.
- [json-module](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/json-module/llms.txt): Provides extra functionality for processing JSON documents.
- [kafka-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/kafka-connector/llms.txt): Enables you to interact with the Apache Kafka messaging system and achieve seamless integration between your Mule app and a Kafka cluster, using Mule runtime engine (Mule).
- [kerberos-module](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/kerberos-module/llms.txt): Kerberos Module adds Kerberos (SPNEGO) proxy authentication support for the Mule HTTP Connector.
- [ldap-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/ldap-connector/llms.txt): A public standard that facilitates maintenance and access to distributed directories (such as network user privilege information) over an Internet Protocol (IP) network.
- [life-sciences](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/life-sciences/llms.txt): The MuleSoft Accelerator for Life Sciences helps pharmaceuticals, medical device companies, and contract research organizations (CROs) seamlessly integrate their digital operations and get their products to market faster.
- [mailchimp-marketing-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/mailchimp-marketing-connector/llms.txt): Enables you to connect Mule flows to the Mailchimp Marketing API.
- [manufacturing](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/manufacturing/llms.txt): MuleSoft Accelerator for Manufacturing equips discrete and process manufacturers with foundational assets for common use cases to accelerate their digital transformation journey.
- [marketo-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/marketo-connector/llms.txt): A closed-source connector that provides a connection between the Mule runtime engine (Mule) and Adobe Marketo REST APIs.
- [mcp-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/mcp-connector/llms.txt): Uses the MCP protocol to enable supported agents to invoke and communicate with APIs and other artifacts built on Anypoint Platform.
- [microsoft-365-ops-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/microsoft-365-ops-connector/llms.txt): Enables integration with Microsoft Dynamics 365 for Finance and Operations Web API.
- [microsoft-azure-sb-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/microsoft-azure-sb-connector/llms.txt): Enables message integration with Azure Service Bus on the cloud.
- [microsoft-dotnet-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/microsoft-dotnet-connector/llms.txt): Enables you to execute native .NET code in a Mule application.
- [microsoft-dynamics-365-business-central-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/microsoft-dynamics-365-business-central-connector/llms.txt): Enables you to access the Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central API.
- [microsoft-dynamics-365-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/microsoft-dynamics-365-connector/llms.txt): Enables integration with the Microsoft Dynamics 365 Cloud API.
- [microsoft-dynamics-ax-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/microsoft-dynamics-ax-connector/llms.txt): Enables Mule apps to interact with the Microsoft Dynamics AX Query Service.
- [microsoft-dynamics-crm-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/microsoft-dynamics-crm-connector/llms.txt): Allows Mule appns to interact with Microsoft Dynamics CRM's SOAP Organization Service.
- [microsoft-dynamics-gp-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/microsoft-dynamics-gp-connector/llms.txt): Enables Mule applications to interact with the Microsoft Dynamics Great Plains (GP) Web Services.
- [microsoft-dynamics-nav-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/microsoft-dynamics-nav-connector/llms.txt): Enables Mule apps to interact with Microsoft Dynamics NAV Web Services.
- [microsoft-excel-online-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/microsoft-excel-online-connector/llms.txt): Enables access to the Excel Online platform.
- [microsoft-onedrive-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/microsoft-onedrive-connector/llms.txt): Enables access to the most commonly used operations provided by the Microsoft Graph APIs.
- [microsoft-outlook-365-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/microsoft-outlook-365-connector/llms.txt): Enables access to the most commonly used operations provided by Microsoft Outlook 365.
- [microsoft-power-bi-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/microsoft-power-bi-connector/llms.txt): Enables access to the most commonly used operations provided by the Microsoft Power BI APIs.
- [microsoft-service-bus-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/microsoft-service-bus-connector/llms.txt): Enables message integration with Windows Service Bus on-premises.
- [microsoft-teams-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/microsoft-teams-connector/llms.txt): Enables access to the most commonly used operations provided by the Microsoft Teams APIs.
- [mongodb-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/mongodb-connector/llms.txt): A closed-source connector that provides a connection between the Mule runtime and third-party software on a MongoDB server.
- [monitoring](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/monitoring/llms.txt): Anypoint Monitoring provides tools to aggregate and map metrics across dependent systems in real-time, configure dashboards and alerts to reduce the mean time to identification of issues (MTTI), and store and search log data at scale.
- [moodle-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/moodle-connector/llms.txt): Enables you to connect to the Moodle API.
- [mq](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/mq/llms.txt): Anypoint MQ is a multi-tenant, cloud-based message queuing service for exchanging data asynchronously between your applications.
- [mqtt3-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/mqtt3-connector/llms.txt): Enables your application to publish and consume messages using an MQTT version 3.x compliant broker.
- [msmq-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/msmq-connector/llms.txt): Provides connectivity to proprietary functionality on the Windows platform.
- [mule-gateway](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/mule-gateway/llms.txt): An API gateway allows you to add a dedicated orchestration layer on top of your backend APIs and services to help you separate orchestration from implementation concerns.
- [mule-runtime](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/mule-runtime/llms.txt): Mule runtime engine (Mule) is a lightweight integration engine that runs Mule applications and supports domains and policies.
- [mule-sdk](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/mule-sdk/llms.txt): Use the Mule SDK for Java or XML to extend the Mule 4 Runtime by creating new modules that you can install in Mule apps.
- [mulesoft-ai-chain-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/mulesoft-ai-chain-connector/llms.txt): Enables you to design, build, and manage AI agents within Anypoint Platform
- [mulesoft-inference-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/mulesoft-inference-connector/llms.txt): Enables you to integrate with multiple AI inference providers and large language models within Anypoint Platform
- [mulesoft-mcp-server](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/mulesoft-mcp-server/llms.txt): MuleSoft MCP Servers implement the Model Context Protocol (MCP) so AI assistants in your IDE can work with MuleSoft products and services.
- [mulesoft-terraform-provider](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/mulesoft-terraform-provider/llms.txt): The MuleSoft Terraform provider enables you to manage MuleSoft resources using Infrastructure as Code (IaC).
- [mulesoft-vectors-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/mulesoft-vectors-connector/llms.txt): Enables you to integrate AI into your data for smarter search and RAG
- [munit](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/munit/llms.txt): Build automated tests for your integrations and APIs with MUnit.
- [neo4j-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/neo4j-connector/llms.txt): Provides the capability to execute CQL statements and run basic operations, such as create, update, delete, and select nodes against a Neo4j Graph database instance.
- [netsuite-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/netsuite-connector/llms.txt): Synchronizes data and automates business processes between NetSuite and third party applications, either on-premise or in the cloud.
- [netsuite-openair-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/netsuite-openair-connector/llms.txt): A closed-source enterprise connector that provides a connection between OpenAir and third-party software.
- [netsuite-restlet-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/netsuite-restlet-connector/llms.txt): Synchronizes data and automates business processes between NetSuite and third party applications, either on-premise or in the cloud.
- [notion-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/notion-connector/llms.txt): Enables you to connect to the Notion API.
- [oauth2-provider-module](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/oauth2-provider-module/llms.txt): Allows a Mule runtime engine (Mule) app to be configured as an Authentication Manager in an OAuth2 dance.
- [oauth-module](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/oauth-module/llms.txt): An extension to hook OAuth2 to HTTP extension connectors.
- [object-store](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/object-store/llms.txt): Object Store v2 lets CloudHub applications store data and states across batch processes, Mule components and applications, from within an application or by using the Object Store REST API.
- [object-store-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/object-store-connector/llms.txt): A Mule component that allows for simple key-value storage.
- [openai-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/openai-connector/llms.txt): Enables you to connect to the OpenAI API.
- [openweathermap-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/openweathermap-connector/llms.txt): Enables you to connect to the OpenWeatherMap API.
- [oracle-ebs-122-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/oracle-ebs-122-connector/llms.txt): Facilitates connections between Mule runtime engine (Mule) integration and Oracle E-Business Suite 12.2 applications.
- [oracle-ebs-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/oracle-ebs-connector/llms.txt): Provides real-time connectivity to query and update Oracle EBS using web services and message queues.
- [pagerduty-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/pagerduty-connector/llms.txt): Enables you to connect to the PagerDuty API.
- [partner-manager](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/partner-manager/llms.txt): Perform bidirectional Business-to-Business (B2B) message exchanges with your external business partner ecosystem.
- [pdk](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/pdk/llms.txt): Omni Gateway Policy Development Kit (PDK) is a software development kit that enables you to develop custom policies to help manage security, control traffic, and improve API adoption.
- [peoplesoft-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/peoplesoft-connector/llms.txt): A closed-source connector that uses the Component Interface (CI) to communicate in real-time with the service.
- [private-cloud](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/private-cloud/llms.txt): Run and manage Mule apps on your local servers following your security policies by using Anypoint Platform Private Cloud Edition (Anypoint Platform PCE).
- [quickbooks-online-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/quickbooks-online-connector/llms.txt): Anypoint Connector for QuickBooks Online (QuickBooks Online Connector) synchronizes data and automates business processes between QuickBooks Online and third-party applications, either on-premises or in the cloud.
- [redis-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/redis-connector/llms.txt): An open source, in-memory data structure store that is used for use cases such as caching a user profile, creating a leader board, tracking real time activities on a website, implementing a spam filtering system, using it as a message queue, use as a custom object store, and more.
- [release-notes](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/release-notes/llms.txt): Release notes for all versions of MuleSoft products, including new features, fixes, and known issues.
- [retail](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/retail/llms.txt): MuleSoft Accelerator for Retail empowers retail IT teams to unlock data from systems including ERP, CRM, MDM, commerce, and marketing to activate digital projects faster.
- [roostify-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/roostify-connector/llms.txt): Enables customers to convert completed loan applications to an optimized and intuitive digital user experience, tailored to each DBA, branch, or channel.
- [rosettanet-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/rosettanet-connector/llms.txt): Provides B2B functionality using the RosettaNet Information Framework (RNIF) for information exchange of Rosetta Partner Interface Process (PIP) messages.
- [rpa-bot](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/rpa-bot/llms.txt): RPA Bots are software robots that carry out any RPA processes assigned to them.
- [rpa-builder](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/rpa-builder/llms.txt): RPA Builder is the on-premise development environment that enables you to build the automations by specifying the tasks and steps of the process.
- [rpa-home](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/rpa-home/llms.txt): MuleSoft Robotic Process Automation (RPA) enables you to automate business processes and tasks by using bots, which helps save time and prevent introducing human errors.
- [rpa-manager](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/rpa-manager/llms.txt): RPA Manager is the cloud-based control plane for the automations that is integrated into Anypoint Platform.
- [rpa-recorder](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/rpa-recorder/llms.txt): Use RPA Recorder to record business processes.
- [runtime-fabric](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/runtime-fabric/llms.txt): Anypoint Runtime Fabric enables you to deploy Mule applications and API proxies to a Kubernetes cluster that you create, configure, and manage.

- [teamwork-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/teamwork-connector/llms.txt): Enables you to connect to the Teamwork API.
- [tracing-module](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/tracing-module/llms.txt): Provides tracing capabilities by managing logging variables and also enables you to modify the correlation ID during the execution of a flow.
- [tradacoms-edi-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/tradacoms-edi-connector/llms.txt): Lets you convert TRADACOMS transmissions to and from DataWeave-compatible representations using lists and maps.
- [trello-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/trello-connector/llms.txt): Enables you to integrate custom applications into Trello to facilitate faster collaboration between teams
- [twilio-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/twilio-connector/llms.txt): A cloud communications infrastructure as a service (IaaS).
- [validation-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/validation-connector/llms.txt): Can verify that the contents of a message in a Mule flow match specific criteria.
- [veevavault-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/veevavault-connector/llms.txt): Enables you to connect Mule flows to the Veeva Vault platform using the Veeva Vault REST API.
- [visualizer](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/visualizer/llms.txt): API Visualizer (formerly Anypoint Visualizer) gives you a real-time, graphical view of your entire application network, including APIs, Mule applications, and the third-party systems they invoke.
- [vm-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/vm-connector/llms.txt): Handles intra-app and inter-app communication through asynchronous queues that can be transient or persistent.
- [web-service-consumer-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/web-service-consumer-connector/llms.txt): Consumes a SOAP Web service to acquire data from an external source.
- [websockets-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/websockets-connector/llms.txt): Provides communication through the WebSockets protocol, allowing external systems to open connections to the server (inbound sockets) or to establish connections to external systems (outbound socket).
- [windows-powershell-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/windows-powershell-connector/llms.txt): Enables Windows OS administration tasks to be integrated into Mule applications.
- [workable-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/workable-connector/llms.txt): Enables you to connect to the Workable API.
- [workday-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/workday-connector/llms.txt): Provides access to standard Workday operations.
- [wss-module](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/wss-module/llms.txt): Can process and validate an inbound SOAP request and sign outbound SOAP responses using Web Service Security (WSS).
- [x12-edi-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/x12-edi-connector/llms.txt): Lets you convert X12 messages to and from DataWeave-compatible representations using lists and maps.
- [xero-accounting-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/xero-accounting-connector/llms.txt): Enables you to access the Xero Accounting APIs.
- [xml-module](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/xml-module/llms.txt): Can process and extract data from an XML document.
- [zendesk-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/zendesk-connector/llms.txt): Enables you to connect Mule flows to the Zendesk platform using the Zendesk REST Support API.
- [zoom-connector](https://siddharthsg2.github.io/mulesoft-docs/products/zoom-connector/llms.txt): Enables you to connect Mule flows to the Zoom API.
